title: Awareness in the New QMS ISO 9001
subtitle: A concise ISO 9001 awareness workshop for teams that need to understand quality management expectations.
whyThisMatters: A quality management system only works when people understand how their daily work connects to process control, customer requirements, risk, and continual improvement. This course gives teams a practical shared language for ISO 9001 without turning the session into a clause-by-clause lecture.
builtFor: Process owners involved in ISO 9001 systems
Employees preparing for internal or external audits
walkAwayWith: Explain the purpose of ISO 9001 in practical workplace terms.
Recognize how process discipline supports customer satisfaction.
Connect risks, controls, records, and improvement actions.
Participate more confidently in QMS implementation and audit activities.

modules.title: The Process Approach in Daily Work

methodologyCaption: Participants connect ISO 9001 concepts to their own work through guided examples, short activities, and facilitator-led discussion.
sourceDoc: course/documents/AWARENESS IN THE NEW QMS ISO 9001.pdf
